description_long: This is a standard 12 fl. oz. aluminum soda can with a predominantly red exterior, decorated with geometric blocks of white, blue, and pink. The front features a large, bold 'SODA' label in white and blue, surrounded by additional text such as 'ORIGINAL', '70 CALORIES', and 'NEW FORMULA'. The can includes detailed nutrition facts and ingredients printed in black on a white background on the back. The top is silver with a typical pull-tab opening mechanism. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible dents or scratches. The can is cylindrical and designed for single-use beverage containment.
description: A red, blue, and white aluminum soda can with bold branding and nutrition facts, featuring a smooth, glossy surface and a standard pull-tab top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large 'SODA' label, calorie count, and prominent branding elements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the 'NEW FORMULA' burst, calorie information, and partial nutrition facts panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full nutrition facts, barcode, and ingredients list in black on white.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more geometric patterns and the end of the ingredients list, less branding visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large 'SODA' text in white and blue, 'ORIGINAL', '70 CALORIES', 'NEW FORMULA' burst, nutrition facts, ingredients, barcode, and 'Please Recycle' text; all branding is printed in bold, high-contrast fonts and colors.
